summary: A superb audience capture with astonishing depth and clarity, highlighted by a ripping Terrapin > Playin' > China Doll sequence.
review: Reviewers rave about the Walker‑Cotton tape’s immersive, crystal‑clear sound that rivals many soundboard releases. The musical high point is the Terrapin > Playin' > China Doll jam, which is praised as one of the best moments of this run. The only drawback noted is an inaccurate track‑list labeling rather than any audio flaw.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance (highlighted sequence) and excellent audience recording quality drive a high rating; minor metadata errors keep confidence from being high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Depth, clarity and realism repeatedly praised; reviewers say it sounds better than many board recordings. No audio defects mentioned, only track‑list mismatches.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set flow is well‑received, especially the Terrapin > Playin' > China Doll jam; only complaint concerns mislabeled songs in the archive metadata.
